messageFromCat2: I’m your senior cat. And yes, I can already see where you’ll mess up
messageFromCat3: I won’t even explain the rules properly, but fine: we play like ‘Cities’, but with frontend words
messageFromCat4: I say div → you respond with a word starting with the last letter, for example variable. Failed? Well… happens. Junior things
messageFromCat5: Topics: JS, TS, CSS, HTML... (If you don’t know half of it — I’m not surprised 🙄)
messageFromCat6: Unknown word? Hover it to see a hint. Yes, I did your thinking for you
messageFromCat7: You start. Try to survive more than three moves 😉
sasarikSadWrongLetter: The letter got lost. With that level of attention, you’ll be calling APIs “somewhere around there”😼
sasarikSadUsed: We’ve already heard that. Your memory is like a cache without invalidation
sasarikSadNotFound: Doesn’t fit — try a frontend-related word
sasarikSadEnd: Ой, у меня закончились слова, похоже Ты выиграл!
